title: Manage environmental and sustainability best practice in an automotive workplace
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage environmental and sustainability best practice in an automotive workplace demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan compliance with environmental regulations and sustainability best practice

pcs.text: Environmental laws, regulations and standards, and sustainability best practices relevant to own automotive workplace are sourced and interpreted1.2 Penalties for workplace and individual breaches of legislation are identified1.3 Workplace activities and equipment that are required to comply with environmental laws, regulations and standards are identified1.4 Workplace activities relevant to sustainability best practices are identified1.5 Environmental action plan is developed that incorporates workplace activities, environmental laws, regulations and standards, and sustainability best practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Environmental laws, regulations and standards, and sustainability best practices relevant to own automotive workplace are sourced and interpreted1.2 Penalties for workplace and individual breaches of legislation are identified1.3 Workplace activities and equipment that are required to comply with environmental laws, regulations and standards are identified1.4 Workplace activities relevant to sustainability best practices are identified1.5 Environmental action plan is developed that incorporates workplace activities, environmental laws, regulations and standards, and sustainability best practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Environmental laws, regulations and standards, and sustainability best practices relevant to own automotive workplace are sourced and interpreted1.2 Penalties for workplace and individual breaches of legislation are identified1.3 Workplace activities and equipment that are required to comply with environmental laws, regulations and standards are identified1.4 Workplace activities relevant to sustainability best practices are identified1.5 Environmental action plan is developed that incorporates workplace activities, environmental laws, regulations and standards, and sustainability best practices.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan compliance with environmental regulations and sustainability best practice

elements.title: Implement environmental action plan

pcs.text: Workplace procedures, equipment and materials are established to meet workplace environmental and sustainability best practice requirements, or existing procedures, equipment and materials are evaluated and updated as required to determine ability to meet requirements 2.2 Checklists are developed to ensure procedures are followed2.3 Safety data sheets (SDS) are sourced and stored, and staff notified of their location2.4 Emergency response procedures for major environmental accidents are developed and documented, and staff are notified of location and documentation developed for recording accidents and spills2.5 Staff are advised of workplace procedures, and use of equipment, materials and checklists2.6 Workplace procedures are put in place to address complaints regarding environmental issues
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Workplace procedures, equipment and materials are established to meet workplace environmental and sustainability best practice requirements, or existing procedures, equipment and materials are evaluated and updated as required to determine ability to meet requirements 2.2 Checklists are developed to ensure procedures are followed2.3 Safety data sheets (SDS) are sourced and stored, and staff notified of their location2.4 Emergency response procedures for major environmental accidents are developed and documented, and staff are notified of location and documentation developed for recording accidents and spills2.5 Staff are advised of workplace procedures, and use of equipment, materials and checklists2.6 Workplace procedures are put in place to address complaints regarding environmental issues?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Workplace procedures, equipment and materials are established to meet workplace environmental and sustainability best practice requirements, or existing procedures, equipment and materials are evaluated and updated as required to determine ability to meet requirements 2.2 Checklists are developed to ensure procedures are followed2.3 Safety data sheets (SDS) are sourced and stored, and staff notified of their location2.4 Emergency response procedures for major environmental accidents are developed and documented, and staff are notified of location and documentation developed for recording accidents and spills2.5 Staff are advised of workplace procedures, and use of equipment, materials and checklists2.6 Workplace procedures are put in place to address complaints regarding environmental issues.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Implement environmental action plan

elements.title: Review environmental action plan

pcs.text: Environmental laws, regulations and standards, and sustainability best practices relevant to work in the automotive industry are regularly sourced and interpreted3.2 Environmental audit of workplace is carried out regularly and results are compared with environmental laws, regulations and standards, and sustainability best practices3.3 Environmental action plan is updated as required to ensure compliance with environmental laws, regulations and standards, and sustainability best practices relevant to work in the automotive industry3.4 Workplace procedures, equipment and materials are put in place, or existing ones modified, to meet changed workplace environmental and sustainability best practice requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Environmental laws, regulations and standards, and sustainability best practices relevant to work in the automotive industry are regularly sourced and interpreted3.2 Environmental audit of workplace is carried out regularly and results are compared with environmental laws, regulations and standards, and sustainability best practices3.3 Environmental action plan is updated as required to ensure compliance with environmental laws, regulations and standards, and sustainability best practices relevant to work in the automotive industry3.4 Workplace procedures, equipment and materials are put in place, or existing ones modified, to meet changed workplace environmental and sustainability best practice requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Environmental laws, regulations and standards, and sustainability best practices relevant to work in the automotive industry are regularly sourced and interpreted3.2 Environmental audit of workplace is carried out regularly and results are compared with environmental laws, regulations and standards, and sustainability best practices3.3 Environmental action plan is updated as required to ensure compliance with environmental laws, regulations and standards, and sustainability best practices relevant to work in the automotive industry3.4 Workplace procedures, equipment and materials are put in place, or existing ones modified, to meet changed workplace environmental and sustainability best practice requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Review environmental action plan

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
